title: Atmea
body: Atmea was a joint venture between Mitsubishi Heavy Industries (MHI) and EDF Group set up in 2006 to develop, market, license and sell the ATMEA1 reactor, a new generation III+, medium-power  pressurized water reactor (PWR). The company was headquartered in Paris. The joint venture was abandoned in 2019.
